OpenFreedomEmailDesigner.SysSettingsError: We're unable to connect to service. Please complete “Identity server Url“, “Identity server client id“, “Identity server client secret“ and “Social Web App Account“ system settings and try again.

Dialog.Title: Confirmation required
Dialog.Message: If you proceed, the set of templates (total: {{templatesToDelete}}) will be permanently deleted. Are you sure you want to continue?

DeleteConditionRequestHandler.UnableToDeleteMessage: Unable to delete: this display condition is applied to a row in a following languages {0}. Remove it from the row first.

AddDisplayConditionMaxCountReachedModal.Title: Display condition limit reached
AddDisplayConditionMaxCountReachedModal.Message: A maximum of {{count}} display conditions can be set for this bulk email. To add a new condition, remove or update an existing one. To learn more about increasing this limit, see the Academy article.

ManageDisplayConditionNotAllowedModal.Title: Display conditions are not supported within classic Creatio interface
ManageDisplayConditionNotAllowedModal.Message: Display conditions cannot be created when classic Creatio interface is used. Please adjust your configuration to enable condition setup.

BulkEmailLanguagesMaxCountReachedModal.Title: Language limit reached
BulkEmailLanguagesMaxCountReachedModal.Message: A maximum of {{count}} languages can be configured for this bulk email. To learn more about increasing this limit, see the Academy article.

EmailDesignerTemplateLanguageSwitchDialo.Title: You have unsaved changes
EmailDesignerTemplateLanguageSwitchDialo.Message: Switching the template language will reset last changes made to the current template. Are you sure you want to continue?
